男主非常有礼貌，精神状态良好，乐观积极开朗
吃水不忘挖井人，吃完人还会说谢谢，
碰到凶恶的陌生人也会在背后打招呼说你好[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700891141,"group_id":"7252033862950194228","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1YmCq8FO+x+qraDoQSx0M+rYtw/gFwUXAgsmPTadZ7x","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/12c0882dca0c43889d64514a08eafb60~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709700&x-signature=5yDtNEVgaiw2AiQTsRg9GUkT5tw%3D","user_id":"1415804754599181","user_name":"我不对劲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1415804754599181","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7252033862950194228","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主，逐渐非人，乐子，杀伐果断不黑暗】
开挂就是用来爽的！穿个越哪来那么多人情世故！什么TM智障反派！脑残女主！我就吃！拜尼玛师，交TMD朋友！我直接窜过去三百六十度托马斯回旋吃！TMD抱着领导脑袋啃！官方也别想跑！直接扑过去咬翻官方的！路人也全啃了！我TM吃吃吃吃吃！
——
“重申一遍，我，陈渊，不是反派！更不是什么幕后黑手！”
身为普通学生，体型大亿点、长点外骨骼、恢复力强亿点、喜欢吃祟孽，有问题吗？
没有问题！
有问题？敢有问题我TM把你也啃了！
面对人类眼里代表死亡、毁灭、污染与恐惧的祟孽，陈渊却脸上咧出兴奋的笑容，庞大而恐怖的身躯宛若魔神一般，一手捏起它们塞入口中。
骇人的咀嚼声后，他露出满意的笑容，瞥了眼旁边瑟瑟发抖的人类，脸上露出恶劣的笑容。
面对不可战胜的恐怖存在，人类是有极限的，所以——我不当人啦！
威胁他？
祟孽？异神？全TM吃了！
邪教？路人？官方？啃了！全TM啃了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/52466ed150ac08ba0e6d470c990bc73a","author":"先去学习","author_id":"","book_id":"7252033862950194228","book_name":"生吞怪物的我，绝对没有发癫！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5459人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7252033977760875047","read_count":"5459","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"616446"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"243","tags":"悬疑灵异,穿越,灵异,无女主,无后宫,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5bfdb37b3b026c42d3b0085aa9ad209a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320933&x-signature=R%2B9n22UfLLmt8oaDk8lTXjjzh0Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4234937785396813","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2139469e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322074853E0963BA2763A3535E5EA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12139,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10465},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400824578559591192","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本放飞自我[害羞]的小说。怎么说呢？作者在刚开始估计还是满脑子在想着我应该怎么写的，还是挺稳健，带有套路化的。然后写着写着就能感觉到他开始放飞自我[害羞]到后面越来越放飞自我[害羞]可以感觉到作者自己把自己给写嗨了[害羞]而读者呢在放飞自我[害羞]的文字之下，逐渐大脑也开始变得放飞自我[害羞]（绝对不是邪神大人的影响！[爱慕]）
        总的来说这是一部放飞自我[害羞]的半爽乐子文小说。讲述的是地球在邪神大人的成长下越变越好的故事（没有996！世界属于邪神大人！！！[舔屏]）这是一部不可多得的“美食文”在放飞自我[害羞]的情况下，还带有一丝丝的脑子…脑子？[什么]脑子！[舔屏]嘿嘿[爱慕]香香的…软软的…奶昔一般的甜味…嘿嘿…真好吃…下一个吃什么呢……[吃瓜]
（最后一丝理智：值得一看[赞]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723142507,"group_id":"7252033862950194228","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个打小有小说看完强迫症的男人终究被各种屎山小说打败😅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxUY0s39VoNLIGvAewIqRxQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/713cec96399245e292c69a3144e83bb9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701824&x-signature=Mk0tI6bylbBXo998cduc0eDU8vk%3D","user_id":"105042112263","user_name":"沧澜城丹宝阁的梵音天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105042112263","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7252033862950194228","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主，逐渐非人，乐子，杀伐果断不黑暗】
